Services.title: Installation Services
Services.subtitle: Professional PPF, tint and ceramic coating application at our Mesaimeer workshop.
Services.ppfDesc: Genuine Vertek PPF applied by trained technicians — full body, front-end, or custom areas. Self-healing, high-gloss, invisible protection against rock chips, scratches and weather.
Services.tintDesc: Heat-rejecting window films in multiple VLT grades. Compliant with Qatar regulations.
Services.ceramicDesc: Long-lasting hydrophobic protection applied over paint or PPF for effortless maintenance and mirror-gloss finish.
Services.detailingDesc: Full interior and exterior detailing using our in-house Autotriz and Briller product lines.

About.title: About ABK
About.subtitle: Your one-stop supplier for premium car care & PPF solutions in Qatar.
About.paragraph1: ABK Trading & Service is a Qatar-based distributor and retailer of premium automotive care products, serving everyone from individual car enthusiasts to detailing shops and wholesale buyers across the country.
About.paragraph2: From our Mesaimeer store we supply paint protection films, ceramic coatings, professional detailing chemicals, interior care, home fragrances and more — sourced from trusted global manufacturers.
About.paragraph3: We also run a professional installation workshop for PPF, tinting and ceramic coating, so customers can buy and have it applied under one roof.
About.value1Desc: Every SKU we carry comes direct from authorised brand supply chains.
About.value2Desc: From retail walk-ins to island-wide wholesale distribution.
About.value3Desc: Installation by trained technicians, advice by people who actually use the products.

WhyQatar.title: Car care made for Qatar's climate
WhyQatar.subtitle: Doha summers reach 45°C+. Sand, salt-laden coastal air and dust storms wear factory paint faster than European clearcoats are designed to handle. Every product we stock is chosen for Gulf conditions.
WhyQatar.point1Body: Vertek paint protection film absorbs the micro-scratches that desert dust polishes into clearcoat over time. Without it, a daily-driven car in Doha shows visible swirl patterns within 12 months.
WhyQatar.point2Body: Premium PPF and 9H ceramic coatings resist UV-driven yellowing and oxidation. Cheap films turn cloudy in two summers; ours carry manufacturer warranties for 7–10 years.
WhyQatar.point3Body: Doha tap water leaves white mineral spots when it dries on dark paint. Hydrophobic ceramic coatings shed water droplets before they can etch — drastically less wash frequency required.
WhyQatar.point4Body: Cars driven near Lusail, Wakra and the Corniche pick up airborne salt that accelerates rust on bare metal. Our protection products seal against moisture ingress at the panel edges.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: How ABK Trading & Service handles your information.
Privacy.intro: ABK Trading & Service ("ABK", "we", "us") respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect when you visit abktradingservice.com and what we do with it. It is drafted in alignment with the principles of Qatar Law No. 13 of 2016 concerning the Protection of Personal Data Privacy (PDPPL). You should seek independent legal advice before relying on it for compliance purposes.
Privacy.section1Title: What we collect on this website
Privacy.section1Body: We operate a marketing and catalogue website. We do not run an e-commerce checkout, do not ask you to create an account, and do not store credit card or identity data on our servers. The only data we receive from your visit falls into three categories: (a) aggregated, cookieless analytics from Plausible (page views, referrer, device category) that contain no IP address and cannot be tied back to you individually; (b) a single functional cookie named abk_audience that remembers whether you chose to browse the retail (B2C) or wholesale (B2B) view — this is not tracking, and it expires after 180 days; (c) standard web server logs kept by our hosting provider (Vercel), which may include your IP address and user agent for security and operational purposes. We do not see or use these logs for marketing.
Privacy.section2Body: Our primary contact channel is WhatsApp. When you tap any "Inquire on WhatsApp" button, your browser opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled message you can edit or discard. From that point onward, the conversation takes place on Meta's WhatsApp platform and is governed by Meta's Privacy Policy. We keep the messages you send us in WhatsApp Business history for as long as reasonably needed to serve you as a customer. You may also email us at sales@abktradingservice.com; we keep those messages in Gmail under Google's privacy terms.
Privacy.section3Title: What we do with your information
Privacy.section3Body: We use the information you provide to reply to product inquiries, quote wholesale pricing, schedule installation appointments, and follow up on outstanding orders. We do not sell, rent, trade, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes. We do not run remarketing advertising campaigns based on your visits.
Privacy.section4Body: Subject to applicable law, you have the right to request access to the personal data we hold about you, correction of inaccurate data, deletion of data we no longer need, and withdrawal of consent where processing depends on consent. To exercise these rights, email sales@abktradingservice.com with a clear description of your request. We will respond within a reasonable time.
Privacy.section5Body: Our products are intended for adult customers and licensed automotive businesses. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 18.
Privacy.section6Body: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be reflected by updating the "Last updated" date above. Continued use of the site after an update indicates acceptance of the revised policy.
Privacy.section7Body: Questions about this policy or your personal data: WhatsApp +974 30838355 · Email sales@abktradingservice.com · Visit Shop 2 & 3, Building 1306, Street 70, Zone 56, Mesaimeer, Doha, Qatar.

Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.subtitle: The ground rules for using abktradingservice.com.
Terms.intro: These Terms of Use govern your access to the ABK Trading & Service website. By using this website you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the website.
Terms.section1Body: All content on this site — text, product descriptions, photographs, logos, layouts, the ABK wordmark, and the visual treatments we use to present our partner brands — is owned by ABK Trading & Service or used with permission. Brand names and logos of Vertek, Autotriz, Briller, Insta Finish, Getsun, Sitrett and Smart Car remain the property of their respective owners. We display them as an authorised distributor and retailer in Qatar. You may not reproduce, scrape, or repurpose our content for commercial use without written permission.
Terms.section2Body: We make a reasonable effort to keep product descriptions, specifications, and availability accurate. However, specifications and stock may change without notice. Product photography is illustrative; actual packaging and appearance may vary by batch. We recommend confirming details on WhatsApp before placing any wholesale order.
Terms.section3Body: Professional installation services (PPF, tinting, ceramic coatings, detailing) at our Mesaimeer workshop are booked on request. Pricing, lead times, and warranty terms are agreed in writing at the time of booking and are not binding until confirmed by ABK staff. Trade warranties offered by Vertek, Autotriz and other manufacturers apply to products only when installed by an authorised installer following the manufacturer's procedures.
Terms.section4Body: Wholesale pricing is quoted per-request based on volume, brand, and payment terms. A price quoted on WhatsApp is valid for seven (7) days unless stated otherwise. Orders are confirmed on payment or against an approved trade account. Delivery lead times depend on stock availability.
Terms.section5Body: This site links out to WhatsApp (Meta), Google Maps (Google), Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok. Your use of those platforms is governed by their own terms and privacy policies. We are not responsible for the availability or content of third-party services.
Terms.section6Body: We provide this website on an "as is" basis and make no warranty that it will always be available, uninterrupted, or free of errors. To the maximum extent permitted by Qatari law, ABK is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential losses arising from your use of this website.
Terms.section7Body: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Qatar. Any dispute arising from your use of the website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Qatar.
Terms.section8Body: Questions about these terms: WhatsApp +974 30838355 · Email sales@abktradingservice.com.
